item.name: Heron's Eel
item.description:
Although their early life is spent in Heron's Way, these eels eventually make their way to bigger ponds.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Eels of the Heron's Way often grow too large to sustain themselves on their environment's meager offerings, and make their way to the One River in search of a feast befitting their station. This has led to their consumption as a delicacy, with merchants seeing a reflection of their own journey in the eel's, though the flavor is naught to write home about.
